projects.name: NearH
projects.description: Centralized real-time healthcare network for India, bridging communication gaps during emergencies.
keyPoints: Built a multi-tenant healthcare network using Next.js 16 and Supabase for live tracking of beds, ICU, and blood banks.
Implemented Redis caching to reduce DB load by 60%, keeping resource discovery <100ms.
Secure data layer with Supabase RLS and Edge Rate Limiting.
RBAC dashboard for hospitals to manage live inventory and emergencies.

projects.name: Infybite
projects.description: High-concurrency multi-tenant system for enterprise food court operations.
keyPoints: Go-based multi-tenant system with 4-level RBAC to manage vendors and operations.
WebSocket hub for 16,000+ concurrent users with <50ms latency.
Secure JWT authentication with HttpOnly cookies.
Scalable data model with GORM + MongoDB.

projects.name: Mess-Bazaar
projects.description: Next.js bidding platform connecting mess contractors with institutions.
keyPoints: Full-stack platform using Next.js + Prisma for institutional bidding.
Real-time bid updates with 100% data consistency.
Mobile-responsive UI with Framer Motion and Tailwind CSS.

projects.name: Gossipyfy
projects.description: Anonymous voice-first social platform with scalable audio streaming.
keyPoints: Secure media upload pipeline using Server Actions and Zod.
Audio streaming infrastructure on AWS S3.
NextAuth authentication with Google OAuth.

projects.name: Canteen Connect
projects.description: Cross-platform food delivery ecosystem for campus cafeterias.
keyPoints: Admin panel + Flutter app to reduce queue times.
Real-time order tracking via WebSockets.
Menu management and live inventory tracking.

projects.name: E-Estate
projects.description: High-performance real estate marketplace with advanced search.
keyPoints: Dynamic property search engine with filters for pricing and amenities.
Firebase asset management for faster loads.
JWT authentication and Google Sign-In for secure onboarding.

projects.name: E-Commerce Web App
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce solution with payment and admin controls.
keyPoints: Independent Admin and User modules with inventory management.
Stripe/Razorpay payment integration.
Dynamic product discovery with real-time search.
